[Question]
Where is the origin of chocolate?

fandom
Chocolate originates from the tropical regions of South America, specifically in the countries like Mexico, Belize, Guatemala, and Ecuador. It comes from the cacao tree (Theobroma cacao), which has been cultivated for at least three millennia in Central America and Mexico. The earliest evidence of use traces to the Mokaya (Oaxaca) with evidence of chocolate beverages dating back to 1900 BCE.
